title: A Day at the Research Center
article_text: Our research center is near a big shop. The major law for our work is about everything in the computer. The staff has a position for someone above the manager. This morning, a film about the human body appears on the paper. The general situation requires an account of all activity. We wait for the film to cover the war topic. The research covers everything from the morning to the night. The computer is above the table in the main position. Someone from the staff is near the shop for a break. The major activity is a study of the human body in the film.

sentences.en: Our research center is near a big shop.
sentences.zh: 我们的研究中心在一家大商店附近。

words.eng_def: a careful study of a subject to find new facts or information
a place where you buy things

sentences.en: The major law for our work is about everything in the computer.
sentences.zh: 我们工作的主要法律是关于计算机里的一切。

words.eng_def: a rule made by a government
an electronic machine for storing and processing information

sentences.en: The staff has a position for someone above the manager.
sentences.zh: 员工团队有一个职位给经理之上的某人。

words.eng_def: a group of people who work for an organization
a job or the place where someone or something is
a person who is not known or named
in or to a higher place than something

sentences.en: This morning, a film about the human body appears on the paper.
sentences.zh: 今天早上，一部关于人体电影出现在纸上。

words.eng_def: the early part of the day from sunrise to noon
a movie or a thin layer
the physical structure of a person or animal
thin material for writing or a written report

sentences.en: The general situation requires an account of all activity.
sentences.zh: 总体情况需要一份所有活动的报告。

words.eng_def: the set of conditions at a particular time
a record of money or a description of events
something that people do for a purpose

sentences.en: We wait for the film to cover the war topic.
sentences.zh: 我们等待电影涵盖战争主题。

words.eng_def: to stay in a place until something happens
to put something over or to include something
a fight between countries or groups

sentences.en: The research covers everything from the morning to the night.
sentences.zh: 研究涵盖从早到晚的一切。

words.eng_def: a careful study of a subject
the early part of the day

sentences.en: The computer is above the table in the main position.
sentences.zh: 计算机在桌子上方的主要位置。

words.eng_def: an electronic machine for processing information

sentences.en: Someone from the staff is near the shop for a break.
sentences.zh: 员工中的某人在商店附近休息。

sentences.en: The major activity is a study of the human body in the film.
sentences.zh: 主要活动是电影中人体的一项研究。

words.eng_def: the physical structure of a person

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“一项关于某个主题的仔细研究”？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a careful study of a subject'?

quiz.question_cn: 'cover' 在句子“The book covers many topics”中的意思是？
quiz.question_en: What does 'cover' mean in 'The book covers many topics'?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词表示“一个群体中的工人”？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a group of workers'?

quiz.question_cn: “在更高的地方”是哪个词的意思？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'in a higher place'?

image_prompts: A modern research center building next to a large shop, with people walking near the entrance.
A computer screen showing legal documents and a list of rules, with a law book on the desk.
An office with a staff meeting, a manager sitting at the head of a table, and an empty chair above the manager.
A morning scene: a paper on a desk showing a film poster about the human body, with sunlight coming through a window.
A general situation board with notes and an account book, people doing various activities in a room.
A group of people waiting in a room, a film projector showing a war scene on the wall.
A research timeline from morning to night, with a clock showing different hours and a book labeled 'research'.
A computer placed on a high shelf above a table, with a clear position marker on the shelf.
A staff member standing near a small shop, taking a break with a cup of coffee.
A classroom or lab where the main activity is studying the human body, with a film playing on a screen.
